tools.name: failure_radar_board
tools.description: The live Failure Radar board: every Indian institution with a fresh vetted dossier (banks, SFBs, co-op banks, NBFCs, MFIs, HFCs), each with a corpus-calibrated failure PD term structure (12/24/36 months), disclosure score, RBI action-zone status, funding-fragility index, market distance-to-default f

tools.name: failure_radar_institution
tools.description: Full radar dossier for one institution by slug: per-quarter score and PD trajectory with drivers, RBI PCA/SAF headroom history, funding read, forensic screen evidence, market reading. Use failure_radar_board first to discover slugs.

tools.name: evidence_markets
tools.description: The validation record per market, one headline each: India (48-institution backtest), United States (550-failure industry-wide watchlist backtest), Europe (named audited case files, deliberately no cohort claim). Start here when asked 'is this thing validated'.

tools.name: evidence_india
tools.description: The Indian crisis record: 48 institutions replayed point-in-time from vetted public filings across two decades — verdicts, lead times, the misses and false alarms included, with uncertainty intervals and the rigor artifacts.

tools.name: evidence_institution
tools.description: One Indian institution's full crisis replay by slug: scored trajectory, sourced quarterly dossier rows, first-alert bookkeeping, verdict line.

tools.name: evidence_us
tools.description: The US bank record: every FDIC-insured bank scored quarterly from free call-report data; 550 receivership failures since 2008, recall 73.1% at a 21.7-month median lead, AUC 0.853 — plus marquee replays (SVB, Signature, First Republic, both 2026 failures) INCLUDING the honest fraud miss, and the name

tools.name: evidence_europe
tools.description: Seven named European case files (Credit Suisse, Banco Popular, Northern Rock, Banco Espirito Santo failed; Deutsche Bank, Monte dei Paschi stressed survivors; UBS control) replayed point-in-time through the UNRECALIBRATED Indian lenses, every figure independently audited against primary filings. Cas

tools.name: universe_search
tools.description: Search the RBI's official registered-NBFC registry (9,000+ entries) by name or CIN, with optional classification (e.g. MFI, HFC) and Scale Based Regulation layer (Upper/Middle/Base) filters. Public record, served verbatim.

tools.name: rbi_supervisory_tape
tools.description: Latest RBI enforcement and supervisory actions (penalties, licence cancellations, directions), scraped from rbi.org.in press releases; every item carries the RBI's own URL.

tools.name: verify_published_record
tools.description: Independently verify the as-published record: the hash-chained point-in-time ledger commitments (and signatures/anchors where enabled) for a stream, server-side. Reports the verifier's verdict verbatim, even when unflattering — that is the point.
